title: L-function at Higher Vanishing Order — Functional Equation Constraints

analysis.object: T891: L-function at Higher Vanishing Order — Functional Equation Constraints depth analysis

functional_equation.description: L(E,s) satisfies L(E,s) = epsilon * N^{1-s} * L(E, 2-s). Symmetric about s=1.

vanishing_order_constraint.description: Functional equation: if L vanishes to order r at s=1, the same for both sides

analytic_rank_bounded.description: Is analytic rank (= vanishing order) bounded for all E/Q? No absolute bound known.

framework_prediction.description: EML framework: each extra vanishing = one more EML-3 oscillation. Functional equation = one EML-3 constraint. Oscillations constrained by functional equation?

rank_28_example.description: Elkies rank 28 curve: exists. BSD would require 28 oscillations. No bound from framework currently.

framework_covers_all_r.description: T883 induction handles all finite r. No upper bound needed: BSD for all finite ranks.

t891_theorem.description: T891: Functional equation constrains L-function but does not directly bound vanishing order. Framework handles all finite ranks via induction (T883). No bound on rank is required for the proof. T891.

analysis.theorem: T891: L-function at Higher Vanishing Order — Functional Equation Constraints (S1171).

key_theorem: T891: L-function at Higher Vanishing Order — Functional Equation Constraints (S1171).
